2. It shall be ensured that the following conditions are met while spending the aforesaid funds: -
i) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Information, Technology and Policy), Maharashtra State, Nagpur.
Ensure that the funds are spent only on sanctioned works and there is no duplication of work.
on any new subject / new area / other than approved works.
You can't spend money on new projects.
(ii) the works specified in the scheme as proposed before the disbursement of such funds.
having the technical and administrative approval of the competent authority and at present
Any finances involved in spending from the grants to be allocated.
Make sure there are no irregularities.

be submitted.
iv) The funds available on the budget distribution system are drawn from the treasury.
The date of the Finance Department before 07.04.2025 and 29.01.2026.
Make sure that the conditions and percentages in the circular form are met. as well as
The guidelines in the accompanying Annexure should be followed strictly.
v) Computerization of Forest Departments issued from time to time for these schemes.
The terms and conditions in policy governance decisions should be met.
vi) Funds disbursed to Boards / Corporations or other bank accounts,
Deposit contributions to the account of the self-employed or to the Public Works Department
Funds cannot be withdrawn.
